name: m365-graph-mcp-server
description: Mock Microsoft 365 (Graph API surface) as a stdio MCP server — users, presence, mail, calendar, OneDrive/SharePoint files, Teams chats. Cross-references workday EMP-* employee ids.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('dist/server.js', 0o755)" && rm -rf dist/data && cp -R src/data dist/data
